goal: Eliminate runtime crashes and misleading progress UI
summary: Phase 1 complete. Fixed two critical runtime bugs: (1) MyPlantsPage Journal tab no longer references undefined monsteraImg/calatImg/pothosImg variables, replaced with Leaf icon placeholder; (2) HomePage daily progress calculation now uses isWateredToday(last_watered_at) to count only plants actually watered today, excluding null/unscheduled tasks from the completed count. Both files pass tsc and eslint.
stepSummaries:
1. In MyPlantsPage.tsx, replace undefined monsteraImg/calatImg/pothosImg references with real imports, useImages from usePlants, or a placeholder component [verified]
  2. In HomePage.tsx, update the progress calculation to exclude null/unscheduled tasks from the completed count [verified]

reviewerRationale: All gates pass; project checks validate.

gateVerdicts.rationale: Both steps had proxy verification (grep for string absence/presence) and syntactic verification (tsc, eslint). The real behavioral verification is in the diffs: Step 1 replaced undefined image variables with a Leaf icon placeholder; Step 2 replaced misleading `totalCount - urgentCount` with `isWateredToday(last_watered_at)`. The diffs prove the load-bearing logic changed.
gateVerdicts.evidence: MyPlantsPage diff: -img: monsteraImg, +<Leaf size={24} />. HomePage diff: +isWateredToday(), +const isCompleted = isWateredToday(plant.last_watered_at); -plant.completed === true.

gateVerdicts.rationale: Phase goal was 'Eliminate runtime crashes and misleading progress UI'. The MyPlantsPage Journal tab no longer references undefined variables (runtime crash eliminated). The HomePage progress calculation now only counts plants whose `last_watered_at` is today, excluding null/unscheduled tasks (misleading UI fixed).
gateVerdicts.evidence: MyPlantsPage.tsx grep for monsteraImg/calatImg/pothosImg returns exit code 1 (no matches). HomePage.tsx now uses `isWateredToday(plant.last_watered_at)` instead of `totalCount - urgentCount`.

gateVerdicts.rationale: Nothing was deferred in this phase. Both runtime bugs identified in the scope were fully addressed.
gateVerdicts.evidence: Scope listed two critical bugs: (1) MyPlantsPage undefined variables — fixed; (2) HomePage misleading progress — fixed. No items were skipped or deferred.
